# Phase 24 — UI Design Contract

> Visual and interaction contract for frontend phases. Generated by gsd-ui-researcher, verified by gsd-ui-checker.

**Scope note:** This is a SMALL, ADDITIVE change to an existing, already-shipped static report page (`news-digest.html`, generated by `src/scripts/generate-news-digest.ts`). There is no framework (no React/Next/Vite/Tailwind/shadcn) — the page is a server-generated HTML string with one inline `<style>` block (`generateBaseStyles` in `src/scripts/report-utils.ts`). This contract adds exactly one new visual element (a cross-reference chip row) to the existing `.news-card` component and reuses 100% of existing design tokens. No new hex colors, no new spacing scale, no new font sizes are invented.

---

## Design System

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Tool | none — static HTML string templates, no component framework detected (confirmed: no `components.json`, no `tailwind.config.*`, no React/Next/Vite in package.json) |
| Preset | not applicable |
| Component library | none — hand-written HTML templates in `src/scripts/generate-news-digest.ts` + shared primitives in `src/scripts/report-utils.ts` |
| Icon library | none — emoji used as inline glyphs (e.g. 🗣), consistent with existing project convention (no icon-font/SVG-icon library anywhere in the reports) |
| Font | `'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Hiragino Sans', 'Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN', Meiryo, sans-serif` — existing, unchanged (`report-utils.ts` `generateBaseStyles`) |

Registry safety gate: **not applicable** (no shadcn, no component registry involved in this phase).

---

## Spacing Scale

This phase does **not** introduce a new spacing scale. The existing `news-digest.html` page uses rem-based spacing tied to specific components (not a generic 4px token grid). Per the scope note, this contract reuses the exact rem values of the existing `.ticker-pill` component (the chip this phase's new chip is modeled on), rather than inventing new tokens.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| chip-padding | `0.15rem 0.5rem` | Chip internal padding — reused verbatim from `.ticker-pill` (`report-utils.ts:194-204`) |
| chip-gap-h | `0.4rem` (margin-right) | Horizontal gap between multiple chips on the same row — reused verbatim from `.ticker-pill` |
| chip-gap-v | `0.3rem` (margin-bottom) | Vertical gap when chips wrap to a new line — reused verbatim from `.ticker-pill` |
| row-gap | `0.5rem` (margin-bottom on the new chip row) | Gap between the new crossref chip row and the commentary paragraph below it — reuses the existing `.news-meta` margin-bottom value (`report-utils.ts:205-209`) for rhythm consistency |

Exceptions: The page's existing spacing is rem-based and component-scoped (not a generic 4/8/16/24px grid) — this is a pre-existing project convention, not introduced by this phase. This phase adds **zero new spacing values**; it only reuses `.ticker-pill`'s existing rem values for the new chip class.

---

## Typography

This phase introduces **no new font sizes**. It reuses the existing `.ticker-pill` size tier for the new chip, and reuses the existing bold-badge convention (`importanceBadgeHtml` in `generate-news-digest.ts:26-29`) for the verdict emphasis inside ticker-match chips.

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height |
|------|------|--------|-------------|
| Chip text (symbol / sector / prefix) | 0.8rem | 400 (regular) | 1.4 (inline chip, no independent block line-height needed — matches `.ticker-pill` which has none set) |
| Chip verdict emphasis (強気/中立/弱気 substring only, ticker-match chips only) | 0.8rem (same as chip text) | 700 (bold) | 1.4 (inline with chip text) |
| Page body / existing headings (h1–h4, `.news-meta`, commentary `<p>`) | unchanged (1.8rem / 1.4rem / 1.15rem / 1rem / 0.85rem / inherited body) | unchanged | unchanged |

Only 2 weights are introduced/used by this phase's new element: 400 (regular chip text) and 700 (bold verdict, matching the existing `importanceBadgeHtml` bold convention at `generate-news-digest.ts:28`). No new font size is introduced — 0.8rem is reused verbatim from `.ticker-pill`.

---

## Color

This phase invents **zero new hex values**. Every color below is reused verbatim from `src/scripts/report-utils.ts` (`generateBaseStyles`, `ACCENT_VARIANTS`, `verdictColor`) or `src/scripts/generate-news-digest.ts` (`importanceColor`).

| Role | Value | Usage |
|------|-------|-------|
| Dominant (60%) | `#0f0f1a` | Page background (`body`) — existing, unchanged |
| Secondary (30%) | `#1e1e2e` (`.agent-card`/`.news-card` surface); `#2a2a3e` (`.ticker-pill` background, reused for the new chip background) | Cards, chip backgrounds — existing, unchanged |
| Accent (10%) | `#8b5cf6` (base) / `#a78bfa` (light) / `#c4b5fd` (lighter) — the news-digest purple family (`ACCENT_VARIANTS["#8b5cf6"]`) | Reserved for: page `h1` bottom border, `h2` left border + text color, `h3` text color, `.ticker-pill` text (`#c4b5fd`) and border, article title link color (`#93c5fd`)/visited(`#c4b5fd`)/hover(`#bfdbfe`). **New in this phase:** the crossref chip border uses `#a78bfa` (accent-light) — distinct from `.ticker-pill`'s neutral `#3f3f5a` border — so the chip visually reads as "meeting accent" rather than a duplicate ticker pill (satisfies D-09's "distinct meeting accent so it reads differently from ticker pills") |
| Destructive | `#ef4444` | Existing: `importance:"high"` badge text color (`generate-news-digest.ts:20`). **Reused in this phase** for 弱気 (bearish) verdict text inside ticker-match chips — no new hex introduced, this is `verdictColor("弱気")`'s existing return value (`report-utils.ts:90-96`) |

Additional semantic mapping reused verbatim from the existing `verdictColor()` function (`report-utils.ts:90-96`) — do not reimplement, import/call it directly:

| Verdict | Color | Source |
|---------|-------|--------|
| 強気 (bullish) | `#10b981` | `verdictColor("強気")` |
| 弱気 (bearish) | `#ef4444` | `verdictColor("弱気")` (= Destructive token above) |
| 中立 / any other value | `#f59e0b` | `verdictColor()` default branch |

Accent reserved for: page chrome (h1/h2/h3 borders and text), existing `.ticker-pill`, article title links, and — new in this phase — the crossref chip's border color only (`#a78bfa`). The crossref chip's **base text** (prefix + symbol/sector, non-verdict portion) uses the same `#c4b5fd` as `.ticker-pill` text; only the verdict substring inside a ticker-match chip is recolored via `verdictColor()`.

---

## Copywriting Contract

This is a passive, read-only report page — there is no form, no user-initiated action, and no client-side interactivity. The fields below are adapted accordingly.

| Element | Copy |
|---------|------|
| Primary CTA | N/A — no call-to-action in this phase; the chip is a passive annotation, not an interactive element (no link, no click handler) |
| Ticker-match annotation (with verdict) | Fixed prefix `🗣 ミーティング言及: ` + `{SYMBOL}` + ` ` + `{verdict}` (verbatim from `highlightedStocks[].verdict`, one of 強気/中立/弱気). Example: `🗣 ミーティング言及: NVDA 強気` |
| Ticker-match annotation (no verdict — `scoredTickers`-only match) | Fixed prefix `🗣 ミーティング言及: ` + `{SYMBOL}` only (no verdict suffix, per D-05). Example: `🗣 ミーティング言及: FXY` |
| Theme-match annotation | Fixed prefix `🗣 関連テーマ: ` + extracted sector keyword (strip trailing `" (TICKER)"` parenthetical from `sectorRecommendations[].sector`, e.g. `"Healthcare (XLV)"` → `"Healthcare"`; display the English label as-is, no translation dictionary — per RESEARCH.md Open Question 2 recommendation, keeps scope minimal). Example: `🗣 関連テーマ: Healthcare` |
| Empty state (0 meeting matches) | No copy at all — per D-09/Success Criteria #4, articles with zero matches render **no chip row whatsoever** (not an empty container, not a "not discussed" label — this was explicitly deferred, see CONTEXT.md `<deferred>`). Layout must be byte-identical to pre-Phase-24 output for these articles. |
| Error state (crossref computation fails) | No user-visible copy — per XREP-02/D-13, crossref failures are fail-soft and silent to the report reader: the digest renders exactly as if 0 matches were found (no chip anywhere on the page), and the failure is surfaced only via a dedicated `[STEP:digest-crossref:FAIL:...]` pipeline marker (operator-facing, not reader-facing). Do not add any "annotation unavailable" banner to the HTML output. |
| Destructive confirmation | None — no destructive actions in this phase (read-only annotation display) |

All chip text (symbol, verdict, sector keyword, and the fixed prefixes) MUST pass through `escapeHtml` from `report-utils.ts` before interpolation — no exceptions, including the fixed-string prefixes (cheap to escape, keeps the rule uniform and audit-proof) and the verdict enum value (schema-validated as `z.string()`, not a hard enum, so not guaranteed-safe upstream).

---

## Component Contract: Crossref Chip Row

Since this phase's entire UI surface is one new component appended to an existing one, the exact HTML/CSS shape is specified here (not a generic template section) to remove all ambiguity for planner and executor.

### Placement (D-08)

Insert a new row **between** the existing `.news-meta` paragraph and the existing commentary paragraph inside `formatArticleCardHtml` (`generate-news-digest.ts:47-64`). Do not alter the `<h4>` badge/title line. Do not alter `.news-meta` itself (source · time · ticker-pills stays exactly as-is).

Current structure (unchanged parts marked):
```html
<div class="agent-card news-card">
  <h4>{badge} {titleHtml}</h4>                                   <!-- UNCHANGED -->
  <p class="news-meta">{source} ・ {time}{tickerPills}</p>        <!-- UNCHANGED -->
  <p>{commentary}</p>                                             <!-- UNCHANGED -->
</div>
```

New structure (annotation present):
```html
<div class="agent-card news-card">
  <h4>{badge} {titleHtml}</h4>
  <p class="news-meta">{source} ・ {time}{tickerPills}</p>
  <p class="digest-crossref-row">{chip1}{chip2}{chip3}</p>        <!-- NEW: only rendered when ≥1 match -->
  <p>{commentary}</p>
</div>
```

New structure (no annotation — MUST be byte-identical to the current/unchanged structure above):
```html
<div class="agent-card news-card">
  <h4>{badge} {titleHtml}</h4>
  <p class="news-meta">{source} ・ {time}{tickerPills}</p>
  <p>{commentary}</p>
</div>
```

**Implementation guidance for byte-identical empty case:** compute `crossRefRowHtml` as an empty string `""` (not whitespace, not an empty tag) when the article has zero matches, and interpolate it directly adjacent to the surrounding markup with no extra literal newline/indentation introduced by the empty case. This is a functional requirement, not just visual — the renderer's existing 0-annotation test suite (`generate-news-digest.test.ts`) must continue to pass unmodified against the new code path.

### Chip Markup

Each individual chip:
```html
<span class="digest-crossref-chip">🗣 ミーティング言及: <strong style="color:{verdictColor}">NVDA 強気</strong></span>
```
or (theme match, no verdict color needed):
```html
<span class="digest-crossref-chip">🗣 関連テーマ: Healthcare</span>
```
or (ticker match, no verdict available):
```html
<span class="digest-crossref-chip">🗣 ミーティング言及: FXY</span>
```

Row wrapper:
```html
<p class="digest-crossref-row">{chip1} {chip2} {chip3}</p>
```
(chips separated by a single space in the source, consistent with how `.ticker-pill` chips are joined in `formatTickerPillsHtml`, `generate-news-digest.ts:36-45`)

### New CSS (add to `generateBaseStyles` in `report-utils.ts`, adjacent to `.ticker-pill`)

```css
.digest-crossref-chip {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #2a2a3e;       /* reused verbatim from .ticker-pill */
  color: #c4b5fd;             /* reused verbatim from .ticker-pill text color */
  font-size: 0.8rem;          /* reused verbatim from .ticker-pill */
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;    /* reused verbatim from .ticker-pill */
  margin-right: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  border-radius: 999px;       /* reused verbatim from .ticker-pill */
  border: 1px solid #a78bfa;  /* DISTINCT from .ticker-pill's #3f3f5a — reads as "meeting accent" per D-09 */
}
.digest-crossref-row {
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;      /* matches .news-meta's rhythm */
}
```

Verdict substring inside a chip is wrapped in `<strong style="color:{verdictColor(verdict)}">` — reuses the existing `verdictColor()` function (`report-utils.ts:90-96`) exactly as-is, no new function needed.

### Multi-match layout (D-10)

- Order: ticker matches first (max 2), then theme match (max 1) — max 3 chips per article, deterministic stable order (ticker matches in original array order, then the single theme match if present).
- Layout: all chips render as `inline-block` spans inside one `<p class="digest-crossref-row">`, exactly mirroring the existing `.ticker-pill` wrapping behavior in `.news-meta` — chips flow left-to-right and wrap to a new line naturally via `margin-right`/`margin-bottom` when the row exceeds card width (no `flex`/`grid` needed, no JS, pure inline-block wrapping like the existing ticker-pill row).
- No visual separator (no `・` or comma) between chips — spacing alone (via `margin-right: 0.4rem`) distinguishes them, matching `.ticker-pill`'s existing join convention.

### Empty state (Success Criteria #4)

Zero matches → zero markup. No `<p class="digest-crossref-row">` element, empty or otherwise. This is a hard requirement, not a style preference: the byte-identical baseline output for unmatched articles is a testable contract (see Validation Architecture in RESEARCH.md).
